entries.title: Python SDK v0.31.1, TypeScript SDK v0.32.0 changed
entries.description: Remote Model Context Protocol (MCP) added Remote Model Context Protocol (MCP) server integration is now available in Beta on GroqCloud, connecting AI models to thousands of external tools through Anthropic's open MCP standard. Developers can connect any remote MCP server to models hosted on GroqCloud, enabling faster, lower-cost AI applications with tool capabilities. Groq's implementation is fully compatible with both the OpenAI Responses API and OpenAI remote MCP specification, allowing develo
